title: Velmir — the Shadow Sword
bodyText:
The horned assassin's shadowed blade, taken in S13 (used by Varen to dismember its former owner). Was **cursed**; **Eira lifted the curse** (S15). Now carried by **Eddy**. Named "Velmir" in the prep notes; magical, largely unexplored.

> [!dm] Unwritten: what it actually does, and what a weapon forged for Lolth's hunter thinks of serving a light-bearer.
